next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task asks revenue from service line 'follow-up timeline prototype review' since beginning of Jan 2026. Exhaustive search for 'timeline prototype review' in 50_finance/invoices returned 5 matches; read all 5 files. Matching line_eur values by issued_on: 2025-10-06=240, 2025-11-03=480, 2025-12-01=240 (excluded before 2026-01-01), 2026-01-17=240, 2026-02-26=240 (included). Arithmetic: 240+240=480.
next_step.observation: Computed total matching service-line revenue since 2026-01-01 is 480 EUR from INV-0004 and INV-0005 line items.
